assertions.description: The analyzer correctly reports 18 footprints, 17 front and 1 back (P1 ISP connector on B.Cu), all 18 classified as smd_count. The tht_count=0 is correct as P1 is a through-pad SMD SPI connector. 2 copper layers, 242 track segments, 24 vias, 1 zone (GND fill on B.Cu), 16 nets, routing complete.

The silkscreen contains text 'antiAFK\nGalvant Industries\n2013 revA' on B.SilkS, which does include a revision ('revA'). The analyzer flags a missing_revision warning, which is technically incorrect since 'revA' is present in the silkscreen text. However, the analyzer's pattern matching may require a specific format like 'Rev A' (with space and capital R), so 'revA' without space is missed — this is a minor parsing limitation.

INCORRECT: The silkscreen text on B.SilkS reads 'antiAFK\nGalvant Industries\n2013 revA', which contains the revision 'revA'. The analyzer fires a missing_revision documentation warning, but the revision information is present. This is a false positive due to the revision pattern matcher not recognizing 'revA' (no space, lowercase) as a valid revision label.
